tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads content from a trusted file path.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Writes content to a file in the output directory.

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Executes a shell command in the Sandbox.

tools.name: query_memory
tools.description: Searches the SQLite database for past errors or context.

tools.name: update_recap
tools.description: Updates the persistent RECAP.json with new learnings or task status.
